_comment: Kanban #1585 — secretary email action policy manifest. DECLARATIVE only. The SINGLE source of enforcement is the _enforce_tool_grant_or_403 (Layer-0, #1799) + _enforce_operator_tier_or_403 (operator-proof tier, #1859) gates in api/src/routers/tools_email.py. This file mirrors the as-built EmailTier vocabulary so humans/agents can read the policy without grepping code; drift between approval_mode==operator_proof here and _PROOF_REQUIRED_TIERS in code is asserted by a test (test_email_tier1_actions.py::test_policy_proof_tiers_match_code). The `calendar` section below is the Kanban #1963 Calendar surface (/api/tools/calendar, Google+Outlook) — its OWN CalendarTier vocabulary (read/write), enforced by the SAME gate machinery reused in api/src/routers/tools_calendar.py; drift between its operator_proof set and CalendarTier._PROOF_REQUIRED_TIERS is asserted by test_calendar_tools.py::test_calendar_policy_proof_tiers_match_code.

calendar._comment: Kanban #1963 — Calendar tools at base /api/tools/calendar (Google + Outlook). CalendarTier vocabulary (api/src/routers/tools_calendar.py). list-events/freebusy relocated here from the #1942 email-router calendar routes.
